heading: Report to Congressional committees
label: 230i Report to Congressional committees
text: By no later than the end of the first full fiscal year following , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate, a comprehensive report with recommendations as to sites within the Mississippi River Delta Region which constitute nationally significant examples of natural resources within that region.November 10, 1978
notes: Change of NameCommittee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives changed to Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives on , by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Third Congress.Jan. 5, 1993
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Interior, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 95–625section 45f of this title
